meta-description: Learn about special health care needs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Special health care need
excerpt: The health care and related needs of children who have chronic physical, developmental, behavioral or emotional conditions. Such needs are of a type or amount beyond that required by children generally.
content: The health care and related needs of children who have chronic physical, developmental, behavioral or emotional conditions. Such needs are of a type or amount beyond that required by children generally.
